list_cases.title: Education Experience
list_cases.description:
Assumption University, Bangkok, Thailand for Bachelor Degree
2007 - 2014

list_cases.title: Project Experience
list_cases.description: Focus on Web Development with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, jQuery, Python, Ruby, PHP and MySQL. And with additional skills like C++, Java, Linux, Algorithm and Calculus.

list_cases.title: Live in Bangkok
list_cases.description: City of Angel, the capital city and the largest city of Thailand, I spent 7 years there for Bachelor Education.

list_cases.title: Chiang Mai
list_cases.description: A famous ancient city in Northwestern Thailand, and also the second largest city of Thailand, I been there many times.

list_cases.title: Ayuthaya
list_cases.description: Another ancient hotspots in Central Thailand, with over 700 years history.

list_cases.title: Mountain Hiking
list_cases.description: Adventurous Hiking in Northern Thailand, exploring the most remote area in Thailand, I spent 4-day hiking in December 2015.

list_cases.title: Lipe Island
list_cases.description: Amazing tropical island in Southern Thailand with 1.5 hrs ferry off the land.

list_cases.title: Yangon Pagodas
list_cases.description: The huge buddhist towers in Yangon City, the capital city of Myanmar, I been there in January 2016.

list_cases.title: Plain Of Jars
list_cases.description: A UNESCO Heritage Sight in Northern Laos, nearby Xieng Khouang Town, several stone lies among the mountainous area, with some ruins date from Vietnamese War.

list_cases.title: Hanoi Downtown
list_cases.description: The backpackers' hotspots nearby Hoan Kiem Lake in Hanoi, Vietnam, I been there in February 2016.

list_cases.title: Mount Fuji
list_cases.description: Landscapes in 2000m sea level of Mount Fuji in Japan, I spent 7-day trip to Japan in 2008.

list_cases.title: My Hometown
list_cases.description: Nanjing City is only 30km away from my hometown, in the Eastern China, this photo was taking inside Olympic Stadium in Nanjing City.
